corrections.text: technode.com is not currently on the project's source_allowlist. TechNode is a reputable Chinese tech-news outlet and is the canonical source for the $1.9B Jan-Feb 2026 funding sprint detail and the 'most-funded startup among China's large model companies' framing. Every claim attributed to TechNode was verified verbatim against the local snapshot. Adding technode.com to config/source_allowlist.txt is recommended.
